title: Shawcross, Eleanor - Head of Policy at No.10 - ACOBA advice
body: "Ms Shawcross left her role at No.10 Downing Street in July 2024.  Trustee, The Richmond Project Ms Shawcross sought the Committee’s advice about joining The Richmond Project as a Trustee. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025 and the role was announced in March 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
